nasb.text: so that there will not be among you a man or woman, or family or tribe, whose heart turns away today from the Lord our God, to go and serve the gods of those nations; that there will not be among you a root bearing poisonous fruit and wormwood.

esv.text: Beware lest there be among you a man or woman or clan or tribe whose heart is turning away today from the Lord our God to go and serve the gods of those nations. Beware lest there be among you a root bearing poisonous and bitter fruit,

cnv.text: 恐怕你們中間有男人或女人，家族或支派，今日心裡偏離了耶和華我們的　神，去事奉那些國的神，又恐怕你們中間有惡根，生出毒草和苦堇來；

ccb.text: 你们中间，不论男人或女人，家族或支派，切不可有人背弃我们的上帝耶和华，去祭拜列国的神明，免得你们中间有残根长出苦毒的果实，
